body_txt: Eyes in places where they just don't belong are a good way to creep people out . The palms of your hands are a particularly frequent place to put them, but they can be anywhere on the body. Sub-Trope of Body Horror . Contrast Eyeless Face , where Eyes Do Belong There but are absent. See also Faceless Eye and The Walls Have Eyes . May overlap with Eldritch Abomination and Extra Eyes . Contrast Third Eye .
